---
title: "Archive"
subtitle: "Official watch-source registry, replay tracking, and post-match model review."
description: "World Cup 2026 game archive with official watch-source metadata, replay lookup guidance, and post-match model review."
image: ../assets/social-preview.png
toc: false
number-sections: false
code-tools: false
code-fold: false
anchor-sections: false
execute:
  echo: false
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE, message = FALSE, warning = FALSE)
root <- if (file.exists("data/processed/modeling")) "." else ".."
source(file.path(root, "R", "report_helpers.R"))
source(file.path(root, "R", "matchday_components.R"))
bundle <- load_matchday_bundle(root)
```

<section class="page-intro prediction-intro">
  <span class="section-kicker">Archive</span>
  <h2>Game Archive</h2>
  <p>Official watch-source metadata, replay lookup guidance, and post-match review tied back to each World Cup fixture.</p>
</section>

```{r archive-page, results="asis"}
cat(render_game_archive_page(bundle))
```
